login.chooseRoleDescription: Select how you use the operations console. You can change this on the next step before signing in.
login.signInContinue: Sign in to continue to the operations console.
login.googleHint: Use your Google workspace account. Your permissions are assigned by your administrator.
login.mockHint: Prototype mode (mock API): continue with the selected role. For Google Sign-In against the real API, set VITE_USE_MOCK_API=false and configure OAuth.
login.tooltipChooseRole: Your role controls menus and data you can see. You can switch before signing in.
login.tooltipChangeRole: Return to role selection without signing in.
login.tooltipMockContinue: Uses a local demo account for this role (mock API).
login.staffPortalBody: Sign in to view your tasks, attendance, and leave in one place.
login.staffSignInSubtitle: Secure access to your tasks, attendance, and leave.
login.staffBulletSecure: Use your company Google account when OAuth is enabled.
login.staffBulletAccess: Same console as managers — with permissions limited to your data.
employees.tooltipSearch: Filters this page instantly. Does not search the server.
employees.tooltipSalary: Base salary figure used for planning and ledger context.
employees.tooltipAdd: Creates a roster entry. Admins and managers can add employees.
tasks.assignSelectHint: Select one or more people. The same part target is created for each.
tasks.toastPickEmployees: Select at least one employee from the roster
landing.heroTitle: Plastic molding built for dependable production
landing.heroSubtitle: Injection molding and batch workflows — organized shifts, clear shop-floor visibility, and OEM-ready quality discipline under Shubham Kale’s leadership.
landing.servicesIntro: Plastic molding equipment and processes for repeatable batch manufacturing in Pune.
landing.mapIntro: We operate in the Pune industrial region. Use the map below or open in Google Maps for directions.
landing.trust1Body: Located in a strong polymer and components corridor with logistics suited to OEM programs.
landing.trust2Body: Tooling care, cycle consistency, and shop-floor routines tuned for plastic batch runs.
landing.trust3Body: Programs where quality and delivery are tracked in the system — not lost in chats and notebooks.
landing.faq1a: Injection molding and related plastic production workflows — share your part family, material, and volumes.
landing.faq2a: Pune, Maharashtra — see the map on this page for directions (exact pin configurable via environment).
landing.faq3q: How do I request a quote?
landing.faq3a: Use the contact form — your enquiry is logged when our API is connected, or your mail client opens as a fallback.
landing.ownerBio: Shubham Kale — committed to quality molding, safe operations, and on-time delivery for every customer program.
landing.contactIntro: Reach the team for enquiries, RFQs, or a facility discussion.
landing.socialPlaceholder: Social profiles will appear here when configured for this site.
landing.formSuccessApi: Thank you — we received your message and will get back to you.
landing.formErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection or try again.
landing.formErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
landing.formSent: Your mail client should open — send the message from there.
landing.footer: Operations software for internal use. Public information may be updated independently of the app.
marketingLeads.title: Marketing leads
marketingLeads.description: Public website contact and RFQ submissions (from the landing page form).
settings.title: Settings & Preferences
settings.description: Set language, dashboard defaults, and table display settings.
attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.description: Record presence by day and review history for the selected range.
attendance.noProfile: No employee profile is linked to your account.
attendance.filterPlaceholder: Filter by name, date, or notes…
attendance.empty: No attendance records in this range.
attendance.tableCaption: Daily attendance with presence and notes
